title: Distance
content:
To the distance! Ah, the distance!
    Blue and broad and dim!
    Peace is not in burgh or meadow,
    But beyond the rim.

    Aye, beyond it, far beyond it;
    Follow still my soul,
    Till this earth is lost in heaven,
    And thou feel'st the whole.
meaning:
Archibald Lampman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Distance"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
